results.rendered_html:
acara a.
1 immovable; carācaraṃ viśvaṃ  Ku. 2. 5 ; carāṇāmannamacarāḥ  Ms. 5. 29. 
2 (Astr.) Epithet of the zodiacal signs vṛṣabha, siṃha, vṛścika and kuṃbha.
